AD_EXTENSION_POINTS.NAME: Ssre_PosLoadLinesRefundInv
AD_EXTENSION_POINTS.DESCRIPTION: This extension point is created to manage the generation of the Invoice (Supplier) lines based on the records in the Reimbursement Lines tab as requested in the 15365 ticket for the Openbravo standard after the completion of the above mentioned process.

AD_EXTENSION_POINTS.NAME: Ssre_PreLoadLinesRefundInv
AD_EXTENSION_POINTS.DESCRIPTION: This extension point is created to manage the generation of the Invoice (Supplier) lines based on the records in the Reimbursement Lines tab as requested in the 15365 ticket for the Openbravo standard before completing the whole process mentioned above.
